title: Christmas Pack
description: A resource pack for celebrating Christmas!
body:
A resource pack for celebrating Christmas! :D

Turns chests, trapped chests and shulker boxes into presents, so you can gift your friends for Christmas in Minecraft in a better way! 
![Presents (Different colored shulker boxes)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f2a22034fbec21f7957d54601ec67d4d4eb6e24.png)

Replaces the music disc "Relic" with a song "ForYouAll" by MeowMusicStudios!
